Assassin's Creed Shadows

Action Multiplayer U/A 7+

Screenshots

Experience an epic action-adventure story set in feudal Japan. Become a lethal shinobi assassin and a powerful legendary samurai as you explore a beautiful open world in a time of chaos. Master two distinct playstyles — the stealth and agility of Naoe or the brute force of Yasuke. Discover historical figures, breathtaking landscapes, and ancient mysteries.
